questions.question: Sam was determined to finish his homework even though he was tired. What does determined mean?

payload.setup: const geo=new THREE.BoxGeometry(1.8,1.8,1.8); const mat=new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({color:0x4fd1ff, metalness:0.25, roughness:0.3}); const mesh=new THREE.Mesh(geo,mat); mesh.name='shape'; scene.add(mesh); const ring=new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.TorusGeometry(2.7,0.04,12,80), new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({color:0xff5ca8})); ring.rotation.x=Math.PI/2; scene.add(ring);

questions.question: Mia peered through the window to see outside in the dark. What does peered mean?

payload.setup: const geo=new THREE.SphereGeometry(1.25,32,32); const mat=new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({color:0xffc857, metalness:0.15, roughness:0.25}); const mesh=new THREE.Mesh(geo,mat); mesh.name='shape'; scene.add(mesh); const floor=new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.RingGeometry(2.1,2.7,48), new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({color:0x73efff, side:THREE.DoubleSide})); floor.rotation.x=-Math.PI/2; floor.position.y=-1.7; scene.add(floor);

questions.question: Jack ran recklessly across the busy road. What does recklessly mean?
A slice of pizza was shaped like a triangle. How many sides does a triangle have?
The bird hovered in the air without landing. What does hovered mean?
options: stayed in one place in the air
questions.correctAnswer: stayed in one place in the air

questions.question: Look at the 3D object on the screen. What is its name?

payload.setup: const geo=new THREE.CylinderGeometry(0.9,0.9,2.1,32); const mat=new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({color:0x7cff8f, metalness:0.18, roughness:0.35}); const mesh=new THREE.Mesh(geo,mat); mesh.name='shape'; scene.add(mesh); const top=new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.TorusGeometry(0.95,0.06,12,50), new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({color:0xffffff})); top.position.y=1.05; top.rotation.x=Math.PI/2; scene.add(top);

questions.question: Sarah waited in anticipation for her birthday surprise. What does anticipation mean?
options: happy waiting for something to happen
questions.correctAnswer: happy waiting for something to happen
